title: Happy Halloween - JPack
description: This TexturePack revamps the heart and food bars with a spooky and fantastic Halloween-themed design.
body:
Are you looking forward to a new experience for your Minecraft? Jblock is back, replete with themed content for your Minecraft universe to celebrate the October celebration. The heart and food bars have been redesigned, giving them a Halloween-themed aesthetic. ![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a367aafcb8ef1d4956d9e00cfb0a8ed03f268c1d.png) ![heart and food icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d819cb47a961ce41ec983ca5827b4729505940.png)
